channel.title: SSbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ukrainians face Chernobyl risks after Russian invasion
item.description: IAEA warns damage to Chernobyl shelter could shorten its 100-year lifespan.

item.title: Carney launches sovereign wealth fund to reduce Canada's US dependence
item.description: Fund will be smaller than those in Norway and Middle East oil producers.

item.title: Ex-Costa Rica president on fertilizer shocks and subsidy reform
item.description: Fertilizer shocks are predictable result of subsidy regime rewarding dependence.

item.title: Planned A.I. High School Suspended Following Parent Opposition
item.description: New York City families raised concerns about the pace of AI adoption in schools. The chancellor also reversed a separate plan to close two Upper Manhattan schools.
